subcodes.first_line: The Tablet of God unto all who dwell in the heavens and on earth, wherein hath been inscribed by the Most Exalted Pen that which causeth souls to soar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لوح الله لمن فی السموات و الارضین الذی رقم فیه من قلم الاعلی ما تطیر به
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort, @call to action
